case_title: JESSICA BIVENS VS. WILLIAM GIFFEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIVENS, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT GIFFEN, WILLIAM LABRENZ, CHRISTINE DOES 1 TO 13, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-06-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-11-2019

FEE PAID ON: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING AND ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE AND ORDER CONTINUING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 63004232) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIVENS, JESSICA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-06-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER - EX PARTE APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING TO APR-26-2019
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-17-2019 CONTINUED TO MAY-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-29-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 62996419) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BIVENS, JESSICA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63205563)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-09-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
